name: HockeyStack B2B Analytics API
what_it_does: B2B analytics and attribution platform with REST API — providing cookieless website analytics, multi-touch attribution across marketing channels and sales touchpoints, pipeline influence analysis, account-level journey tracking, and revenue analytics connecting marketing activities to closed deals.
use_cases: Querying marketing attribution data by channel for B2B revenue operations reporting
Pulling account-level journey data to understand which touchpoints influenced deals
Integrating HockeyStack pipeline influence data with CRM for channel ROI analysis
Analyzing content performance based on pipeline and revenue influence rather than vanity metrics
Automating executive marketing attribution reports from HockeyStack data
not_for: Real-time ad platform optimization bidding signals
Ecommerce conversion optimization without enterprise B2B sales cycle
best_when: A B2B marketing and revenue operations team wants to understand the true revenue impact of marketing channels and content, with account-level journey visibility and cookieless tracking.
avoid_when: You need B2C attribution, real-time ad bidding signals, or your sales cycle is too short for multi-touch attribution to be meaningful.

auth.notes: API key from HockeyStack account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. JavaScript tracking pixel for cookieless website data collection. No OAuth2 or webhooks. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot) via native connector.

pricing.notes: Turkish/US company (San Francisco). Founded 2020. Raised $20M. Series A from Sequoia. Cookieless tracking via first-party data — GDPR-friendly differentiator. Account-level identification via domain matching. CRM + marketing data unification. Strong in PLG and enterprise SaaS B2B marketing teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for accounts, contacts, touchpoints, and attribution reports. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. JavaScript tracking pixel required before data collection. CRM integration required for pipeline and revenue attribution. No webhooks — polling for analytics updates.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Attribution reads fully idempotent by date range. Account reads idempotent. Touchpoint reads idempotent. Revenue reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: JavaScript tracking pixel required for cookieless website data before API data is available
CRM connection required for pipeline and revenue attribution to be meaningful
Domain verification required for account-level website visitor identification
Attribution data has processing delay — not real-time for recent touchpoints
No webhooks — implement polling for new attribution data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Cookieless tracking — GDPR-friendly approach. Revenue data integration requires CRM access — evaluate data sharing scope. Turkish/US company with EU compliance focus.
